name: Raken Construction Daily Reporting API
what_it_does: Raken (HCSS) construction daily reporting and field management REST API for digital daily reports, safety observations, time tracking, and project documentation. Enables AI agents to manage daily report creation and field log documentation for automated project record keeping, handle time tracking and crew management for field labor productivity monitoring, access safety observation and hazard identification for jobsite safety program automation, retrieve photo and video field documentation for project visual record management, manage weather data integration and delay documentation for construction claim support, handle toolbox talk and safety meeting management for safety program compliance automation, access project daily progress metrics for owner reporting automation, retrieve manpower and equipment tracking for resource utilization analysis, manage quality observation and inspection logging for quality control workflow, and integrate Raken with project management platforms (Procore, Autodesk Build) and accounting systems for unified construction operations.
use_cases: Creating daily field reports from construction operations agents
Logging safety observations from jobsite safety agents
Tracking crew time from field labor agents
Documenting weather delays from project record agents
not_for: Construction accounting and job costing (use dedicated construction ERP)
BIM coordination and design review (use Autodesk or Procore)
Complex scheduling and earned value management
best_when: A general contractor, specialty subcontractor, or construction manager wanting AI agents to automate digital daily reporting, safety observation logging, field time tracking, photo documentation, and quality inspection recording for construction jobsite operations.
avoid_when: OSHA RECORDABLE INCIDENT ROUTING FOR SAFETY OBSERVATIONS: Automated safety observation creation in Raken that captures injury, near-miss, or environmental incidents must route to safety manager for OSHA 300 log evaluation; automated observation closure without safety review creates OSHA recordable misclassification and failure-to-record violation. WEATHER DELAY DOCUMENTATION LEGAL ADMISSIBILITY: Automated weather delay records in Raken used to support construction delay claims require corroboration from NOAA weather station data; automated delay documentation without official weather source corroboration weakens claim evidentiary value. CERTIFIED PAYROLL ACCURACY FROM TIME TRACKING: Automated time entries in Raken used for certified payroll reports on prevailing wage projects must reflect actual hours worked per craft classification; automated time entry without field foreman verification creates Davis-Bacon certified payroll inaccuracy. HCSS ACQUISITION PRODUCT ROADMAP: Raken was acquired by HCSS (Heavy Construction Systems Specialists) in 2021; verify current API investment and product roadmap integration with HCSS HeavyJob and other HCSS products before deep Raken API integration.

auth.notes: Raken uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. San Diego, California HQ. Founded 2014. Acquired by HCSS (Heavy Construction Systems Specialists) in 2021. HCSS is a private, employee-owned Texas company serving heavy civil construction. Raken used by 4,500+ construction companies for daily reporting and field management. Competes with Procore field logs, Autodesk Build daily reports, and eSUB for construction daily reporting.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-user monthly or annual subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user monthly or annual subscription; project-based pricing available
pricing.notes: San Diego CA. HCSS subsidiary (acquired 2021). Founded 2014. 4,500+ construction companies. Employee-owned HCSS parent. Per-user subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; daily report and photo upload endpoints throttled per subscription tier

known_agent_gotchas: OSHA INCIDENT OBSERVATION SAFETY MANAGER ROUTING: Automated Raken safety observation creation that captures injury, near-miss, or environmental incident data must route to safety manager for OSHA 300 log evaluation before automated closure; automated observation closure without safety review creates OSHA recordable failure-to-record violation

HCSS ACQUISITION API INTEGRATION ROADMAP: Raken was acquired by HCSS in 2021 and may be integrated into HCSS product suite; verify current standalone Raken API investment vs HCSS HeavyJob API migration; product consolidation may affect Raken-specific API stability

Weather delay corroboration for claim support — automated weather delay records from Raken auto-populated weather data must be corroborated with NOAA or local weather station official records for construction delay claim use; Raken-only weather data without official source corroboration is insufficient evidence for contract delay claim

Photo upload size and format limits — Raken photo documentation API has file size and format limits for field photos; automated photo upload workflows must validate file size (< 10MB typically) and format (JPEG, PNG) before upload; automated upload of raw camera photos without compression causes upload failure

Daily report PDF generation timing — Raken daily report PDF generation for record keeping is asynchronous; automated PDF export requests for completed daily reports may require polling for generation completion; implement status polling or schedule-based export with delay for PDF availability

Time tracking vs certified payroll craft classification — Raken time tracking captures total hours; certified payroll for prevailing wage projects requires hours broken down by craft classification and wage determination; automated certified payroll from Raken requires craft classification data in time entry; ensure field foremen enter craft code with time
agent_readiness.security_notes: Construction daily reporting. SOC2. OAuth2/API key. US. Field operations and safety observation data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Construction field operations. SOC2. OAuth2/API key. US. Daily report and safety observation data.
